overview: Mistral Small 4 is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Small line. Released 2026-03-16. Compact open-weight line for low-latency, locally deployable general use.
What's notable in this version: 119B-total / 6B-active MoE unifying reasoning, vision and coding with a per-request reasoning_effort control; Apache 2.0, 256k context (mistral-small-2603).
